title: platostoma dilungense
intro: Platostoma dilungense, also known as Lokešia or locally referred to as "Lungsi," is a plant species native to the Philippines that belongs to the Lamiaceae family of plants. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Platostoma dilungense include its ability to alleviate coughs and colds, reduce fever, and treat respiratory tract infections, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Filipino medicine. Platostoma dilungense can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in hot water to release its active compounds, providing relief from respiratory issues and promoting overall well-being.
